zh.lifeSummary: 當John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch於1548年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾蓋爾洛時，他的父親John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch38歲，母親Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm26歲。他於1572年與Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1628年在蘇格蘭洛-爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭希倫德蓋爾洛蓋爾洛 笛卡爾 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch于1548年出生在苏格兰洛-爾蓋爾洛时，他的父亲John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch38岁，母亲Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm26岁。他于1572年与Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1628年在苏格兰洛-爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰希倫德蓋爾洛蓋爾洛 笛卡爾 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch was born in 1548, in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch, was 38 and his mother, Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm, was 26. He married Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry in 1572, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1628, in Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 80, and was buried in Gairloch Old Burial Ground, Gairloch, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch est né en 1548, à Gairloch, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry en 1572, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1628, à Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Gairloch Old Burial Ground, Gairloch, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch 1548 in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch 38 und seine Mutter Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm 26. Er hat 1572 in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1628 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Gairloch Old Burial Ground, Gairloch, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch è nato il nel 1548 nel Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry nel 1572, nel Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1628, nel Ross-shire, Scotland, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Gairloch Old Burial Ground, Gairloch, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairlochが1548年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアガイルロチで生まれた時，父John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairlochは38歳，母Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholmは26歳であった。1572年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイでLady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1628年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアで80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドヒグhランドガイルロチガイルロチ オルド ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch(이)가 1548년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 게어럭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1572년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1628년 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 게어럭 게어럭 드 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch nasceu em 1548, em Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry em 1572, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1628, em Ross-shire, Scotland, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Gairloch Old Burial Ground, Gairloch, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch родился в 1548 г. в местности геирлоч, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry в 1572 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1628 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности геирлоч олд буряль гроунд, геирлоч, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John - Ruadh Mackenzie 4th of Gairloch nació en 1548, en Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, John - Glassich Mackenzie 2nd of Gairloch, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Janet-nic-James Fraser heretrix of Phoineas,  relic of Gairloch, latterly of Chisholm, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth MacDonald of Glengarry en 1572, en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1628, en Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Gairloch Old Burial Ground, Gairloch, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido.
